Short Description: Braised Short Rib and Red Wine Reduction with Roasted Rainbow Carrots and Broccoli over Toasted Brown Rice
Long Description: Slow-braised short rib, finished with a rich red wine reduction, served with roasted rainbow carrots and broccoli over nutty toasted brown rice for a classic, steakhouse-inspired dish with a refined finish.

Short Description: Blackened Chicken and Smoky Honey Harissa BBQ Glaze with Charred Zucchini and Roasted Cauliflower over Cilantro Lime Rice
Long Description: Bold blackened chicken glazed with a smoky honey harissa BBQ sauce, paired with charred zucchini and roasted cauliflower over bright cilantro lime rice for a balanced sweet-heat bowl with a fresh finish.

Short Description: Birria Beef and Salsa Verde with Fajita Vegetables over Sazon Rice
Long Description: Slow-cooked birria beef with a birria consome topped with vibrant salsa verde and served with fajita vegetables over savory sazon rice for a deeply flavorful dish with a bright, herbaceous lift.

Short Description: Red Curry Shrimp and Coconut Curry Sauce with Green Beans and Red Bell Peppers over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Tender shrimp in a fragrant coconut red curry sauce with green beans and red bell peppers over jasmine rice, delivering a smooth, aromatic curry with balanced heat and a clean finish.

Short Description: Our classic high protein and collagen-rich chicken bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our classic chicken bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours with fresh herbs and spices.

Short Description: Tiramisu chia pudding with granola topped with a layer of Biscoff cookie crumble
Long Description: Creamy espresso-vanilla chia pudding layered with a lightly sweet tiramisu-style cream, finished with a cocoa dusting and Biscoff cookie crumble for a rich, dessert-inspired treat with the perfect crunch
